name: memory-hub
description: Direct Memory Hub tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Direct Memory Hub tools for recall and capture.
interface.longDescription: Token-efficient Memory Hub tools for Codex that call the gateway REST API directly for recall, capture, lifecycle updates, queue awareness, and compact memory workflows.
defaultPrompt: Store durable facts, preferences, and decisions after confirmation.
Use queue status when the task depends on backlog health.
